claude-code.description: Model ids accepted by Anthropic's Claude Code CLI (the --model flag / settings). LiteLLM does not track client-level acceptance; this is maintained by observation of the CLI.

codex.description: Model ids accepted by OpenAI's Codex CLI (the --model flag / config). Maintained by observation of the CLI and its /backend-api/codex/models surface.

gemini-cli.description: Model ids accepted by Google's Gemini CLI (the --model flag / config). Maintained by observation of the CLI.
